{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220613136C6A89DCF576426B8D76"}"},"total":9328},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7227754855477265167","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不知道为什么评分这么低？我觉得很好看呀！思路也开阔，情节跌宕起伏，虽然套路老了点，但看起来不会让人觉得无聊，节奏也把握的很好。而且没有暧昧情节，就是杀人喜欢插心脏，不喜欢砍头，让我看得总以为后期这人还会活过来。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1682842922,"group_id":"7207066781708454916","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzE1MDQ+uP8+i3zmV1glPWuP4uaiHmsg1t73Xln89afK","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702960&x-signature=tRnwf4v8J2ikrGzX%2B9K6cLn0GrM%3D","user_id":"2445780325762270","user_name":"爱吃布甸的鲁琪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2445780325762270","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1646114179,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7207066781708454916","book_info":{"abstract":"本小说改编短剧《极寒末世的觉醒之旅》
【已完结+天灾重生+基因锁+空间+杀伐果断+无女主+一人一宠物军团】

林时重生，回到极寒降临前的三个月。
上一世，他亲眼见证天灾的爆发摧毁人类文明：
电磁脉冲让全球瘫痪，地磁风暴引发零下百度的极寒地狱，90%的物种灭绝，幸存生物异变成嗜血怪物……
而他，遭遇最好朋友的背叛！
这一次，他誓要改写命运！

觉醒祖传聚宝盆，林时开启逆天外挂——
空间无限扩容，物资无限复制！
从一枚神秘古币开始，他疯狂囤积亿万物资：粮食、武器、能源、医疗设备……甚至打造出坚不可摧的末日堡垒。
然而，末世不仅是天灾的考验，更是人性的修罗场。
当暴风雪淹没文明，幸存者沦为野兽，林时手握利刃，带着伙伴“魔王”，踏上一条杀伐果断的生存之路。

nt":"1.2342193e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220613136C6A89DCF576426B8D76"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":92,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1642,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13984,"reply_count":25,"show_pv":227715},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7252439444702774068","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很nice，目前是我看末世文里面最不错的了，也可能是我看得有点少了[害羞]主角不猥琐发育是我最满意的一个，没有女主也是！主角一个人带魔王独美，谁都不信。好多小说主角描写的实在太猥琐油腻了我真的受不了[捂脸]还是这个不错，看着他和魔王一路慢慢走过来，也慢慢有了自己的源兽军团邹形说别激动是假的，感觉就像亲眼看着的好大儿(当然想想而已，作者大大才是亲妈[思考])从籍籍无名被人欺负的份成长到一个强大基本上无人可犯的强者，我相信林时后面会越来越好的，作者加油啊[码住]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1688590494,"group_id":"7207066781708454916","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"好想再遇到能看完的小说","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzW2LW0bTU/RSVm6XyIPoJbHan2rhvGc5aqAC+KVCTJs","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3af34d48e5af4ae4a6d1fc1502324bc4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708832&x-signature=5vUjCRN1nmhJHGZQFV9aJ70C4Yc%3D","user_id":"3949079158327032","user_name":"黎尚"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3949079158327032","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7207066781708454916","book_info":{"abstract":"本小说改编短剧《极寒末世的觉醒之旅》
